data.title: Solana Foundation and multiple ecosystem parties release the "Internet Capital Market" roadmap
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Leaders of Solana Foundation, Anza, Jito Labs, DoubleZero, Drift and Multicoin Capital jointly wrote the "Internet Capital Market" roadmap. It proposes the future evolution direction with Application-Controlled Execution as the core, covering the short-term online Jito trading module BAM, the medium-term low-latency communication network DoubleZero and Alpenglow consensus protocol, and the long-term deployment of the multi-leader mechanism (MCL) CoinDesk)

data.title: Yi Lihua: ETH is trending strongly and is close to ending its volatility. Don’t short in a bull market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LD Capital founder Yi Lihua posted on the X platform, "ETH is close to ending its volatility. Originally, this was a huge pressure point, and many OGs collectively untied their positions. In the bull market trend, no matter what kind of negative factors there are, don't short and try not to short, and stick to the principle of trend investment."

data.title: IMF: El Salvador's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Fund accumulates Bitcoin to meet program conditions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The International Monetary Fund said: El Salvador's Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Fund's accumulation of Bitcoin meets the planned conditions. El Salvador's Bitcoin holdings are in line with the country's planned commitments. The total amount of Bitcoin held in the Salvadoran government wallet remains unchanged. (Jinshi)

data.title: IMF Confirms El Salvador's Bitcoin Reserve Strategy Aligns with National Plans
data.description: According to PANews, the International Monetary Fund (IMF) has affirmed that El Salvador's strategic accumulation of Bitcoin reserves is in line with the country's planned commitments. The total amount of Bitcoin held in the Salvadoran government's wallet remains unchanged, reflecting adherence to the nation's outlined strategy.

data.title: Ethereum Just Flipped the Narrative — Here’s What’s Driving It
data.description:

data.title: Solana's DeFi Development Partners with Mayan for Enhanced Cross-Chain Exchange
data.description: According to Foresight News, Solana's financial strategy company, DeFi Development, has announced a strategic partnership with the Solana ecosystem's cross-chain trading protocol, Mayan. Through this integration, Mayan now supports the cross-chain and native exchange of DeFi Dev Corp's tokenized equity instrument, DFDVx. This collaboration aims to provide users with seamless access across multiple blockchain networks.

data.title: Bitmine Immersion Expands ATM Program to $4.5 Billion
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bitmine Immersion (BMNR) has increased the size of its "at-the-market" (ATM) offering program from $2 billion to $4.5 billion. On July 24, the company submitted a supplemental prospectus to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, authorizing the continuous sale of common stock in the open market through brokers Cantor Fitzgerald and ThinkEquity. This expansion aims to provide funding for further acquisition of ETH and to enhance asset reserves.

Previously, Bitmine updated its ETH holdings, reporting a total of 566,776 ETH as of 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on July 23, 2025 (11:59 a.m. UTC+8 today), valued at over $2 billion.

data.title: TRON Inc. Celebrates Nasdaq Rebranding with Justin Sun's Participation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, TRON founder Justin Sun participated in the Nasdaq opening bell ceremony as a strategic advisor for TRON Inc., marking the company's official rebranding. Previously known as SRM Entertainment, the Nasdaq-listed company announced in June its plan to launch a $210 million TRON enterprise treasury strategy and rebrand to TRON Inc. On July 16, SRM Entertainment officially changed its name to TRON Inc., and from July 17, 2025, the stock symbol was updated from 'SRM' to 'TRON'. This series of financial maneuvers highlights the growing integration of crypto assets with the traditional financial system.

Justin Sun expressed pride in TRON (TRX) being strategically reserved by a Nasdaq-listed company, viewing it as a significant milestone for both TRON Inc. and the blockchain industry. He emphasized that this marks the true beginning of the cryptocurrency era. Sun also extended gratitude to his family for their support and to the TRON team for their relentless efforts in building the ecosystem.

data.title: Bank of America: U.S. stablecoin supply may increase by $25 billion to $75 billion in the short term due to the GENIUS Act
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bank of America said that with the passage of the GENIUS Act, the supply of stablecoins is expected to grow by $25 billion to $75 billion in the short term. The bill lays the foundation for stablecoin regulation in the United States and promotes the development of related infrastructure and tokenized finance. Bank of America also pointed out that the banking industry is preparing to issue stablecoins through a consortium model. This growth is expected to drive an increase in demand for U.S. Treasuries and promote the widespread adoption of digital assets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Stablecoin Supply Expected to Surge Following GENIUS Act Passage
data.description: According to PANews, Bank of America anticipates a significant increase in stablecoin supply, projecting a rise of $25 billion to $75 billion in the short term following the passage of the GENIUS Act. This legislation establishes a regulatory framework for stablecoins in the United States, fostering the development of related infrastructure and tokenized finance. The bank also highlighted that the banking sector is preparing to issue stablecoins through a consortium model. This growth is expected to boost demand for U.S. Treasury bonds and promote the widespread adoption of digital assets.

data.title: Former Ethereum core developer: ETH's bullish logic in the next few years is not corporate balance sheet configuration, but the global adoption of stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Eric Conner, a former Ethereum core developer, posted on a social platform that the bullish logic of ETH in the next few years is not the allocation of corporate balance sheets, but the global adoption of stablecoins. He pointed out that people around the world want to gain exposure to the US dollar, and this demand will usher in explosive growth. In the process, potentially billions of people will discover the Ethereum network.

data.title: iShares Ethereum ETF becomes 3rd-fastest ETF to hit $10B in assets
data.description:
BlackRock’s iShares Ethereum ETF reached $10 billion in assets in just 251 days since its launch one year ago, while its Bitcoin ETF took only 34 days to break the milestone.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/blackrock-spot-ether-etf-third-fastest-10-billion-assets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BlackRock's Ethereum ETF Achieves Rapid Growth Milestone
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, BlackRock's spot Ether exchange-traded fund (ETF), known as the iShares Ethereum ETF (ETHA), has rapidly ascended to become one of the fastest-growing ETFs globally. This achievement places it alongside two other cryptocurrency funds in terms of growth speed. Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas reported that ETHA has become the third-fastest ETF to reach $10 billion in total assets under management (AUM), achieving this milestone in just 251 days since its launch. Balchunas highlighted the remarkable growth, noting that ETHA doubled its assets from $5 billion to $10 billion in a mere 10 days, describing this surge as akin to a "God candle." This rapid expansion positions ETHA ahead of the JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Income ETF (JEPQ), which took 444 days to reach the same asset level.

The unprecedented growth of ETHA underscores the increasing popularity and demand for spot crypto ETFs, as noted by Nate Geraci, president of NovaDius Wealth Management. Geraci emphasized the significance of this trend, pointing out that the ETF industry has been established for over three decades and comprises nearly 4,400 products. Despite ETHA's impressive growth, BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF remains the leader in terms of rapid asset accumulation. Launched in January 2024, the iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) set a record by reaching $10 billion in AUM just 34 days after its debut. Fidelity Investments' Wise Origin Bitcoin Fund (FBTC) followed closely, achieving the same milestone in 54 days.

In recent months, Ether ETFs have experienced a notable increase in inflows, particularly in July, while Bitcoin ETFs have seen a slowdown. Data from SoSoValue indicates that Ether ETFs in the United States have maintained a 14-day inflow streak, accumulating $4.4 billion since July 3. This streak includes a significant daily inflow of $726.7 million, marking the largest since the ETF's launch last July. Conversely, Bitcoin ETFs have encountered challenges, with inflows turning negative on July 21 after a 12-day streak. Since then, U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have experienced $289 million in outflows over the past three trading days, according to SoSoValue data. This shift in investor sentiment highlights the dynamic nature of the cryptocurrency ETF market and the evolving preferences of investors.

data.title: Ethereum's Future Growth Tied to Stablecoin Adoption, Says Former Developer
data.description: According to BlockBeats, former Ethereum core developer Eric Conner has expressed that the future growth of Ethereum (ETH) in the coming years is not primarily driven by the adoption of 'treasury companies.' Instead, Conner believes the real bullish logic lies in the global proliferation of stablecoins. He suggests that people worldwide are eager to gain exposure to the U.S. dollar, and this demand is expected to grow exponentially. Through this process, billions of individuals may come into contact with and become familiar with Ethereum.
